title: Howmet (HWM) Gains 9.4% in Six Months: More Room to Rally?
text: Howmet (HWM) is poised to benefit from its exposure to diverse end markets, cost-saving efforts, a solid product portfolio and shareholder-friendly policies.

title: Howmet (HWM) Down 2.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
